member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Enums.BridgeFormat
member.summary: The wire formats the WEB8 protocol bridge can translate into/out of the unified MeshMessage envelope.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Enums.BridgeFormat.Json
member.summary: Payload is already a JSON document - passed through as-is.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Enums.BridgeFormat.FormUrlEncoded
member.summary: Payload is application/x-www-form-urlencoded key=value pairs - parsed into a JSON object.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Enums.BridgeFormat.PlainText
member.summary: Payload is plain text - wrapped as { "text": "..." }.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Enums.NodeType
member.summary: The role a node plays in the WEB8 mesh.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager
member.summary: The fractal holonic mesh network at the heart of WEB8. Nodes register themselves (any externally-reachable system that can accept a relayed message at an HTTP endpoint), declare weighted links to other nodes, and the manager computes real shortest-path routes via Dijkstra's algorithm. Routing is self-healing: a node that hasn't been seen within the liveness window, or that fails to accept a relay during a send, is automatically excluded and the route recomputed around it - "no single point of failure" implemented as real graph algorithms, not narrative.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager.LivenessWindow
member.summary: A node not heard from within this window is treated as down for routing purposes.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager.AddLinkAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Double)
member.summary: Declares a bidirectional weighted link between two nodes - an edge in the mesh graph.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager.HeartbeatAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Records a heartbeat for a node - keeps it inside the liveness window so routing continues to consider it healthy.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager.ComputeRouteAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Computes the shortest (lowest cumulative latency) path between two nodes via Dijkstra's algorithm, excluding any node outside the liveness window or explicitly passed in excludeNodeIds (self-healing).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager.SendMessageAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.MeshMessage)
member.summary: Routes and relays a message hop-by-hop to its destination via real HTTP forwarding. If a hop fails to accept the relay, that node is excluded and the route is recomputed from the last successful hop - self-healing failover in action, not merely described.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.GalacticMeshManager.Dijkstra(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Guid,System.Double}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Guid},System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Standard Dijkstra shortest-path over the supplied weighted adjacency graph, restricted to the given set of healthy node ids.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Managers.ProtocolBridgeManager
member.summary: Translates any external system's wire format into the unified MeshMessage envelope and back - "any civilisation's communication standard is translated through the holonic abstraction layer" implemented as real, deterministic format adapters rather than narrative. New formats are added by extending BridgeFormat and the corresponding case here, the same extensibility pattern as AIProviderManager's provider switch.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.GalacticNode
member.summary: A registered node in the WEB8 mesh - any external system that can receive a relayed MeshMessage at its EndpointUrl.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.GalacticNode.EndpointUrl
member.summary: The HTTP endpoint this node receives relayed mesh messages at.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.GalacticNode.IsSovereign
member.summary: Every node retains full sovereignty within the mesh - it can leave/be excluded from routing at any time.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.MeshLink
member.summary: A bidirectional link (mesh edge) between two nodes, carrying its measured latency for shortest-path routing.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.MeshMessage
member.summary: A message to be routed across the mesh from a source node to a destination node, multi-hop if needed.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.MeshMessage.Ttl
member.summary: Time-to-live - the maximum number of hops before the message is dropped (mirrors IP TTL, prevents routing loops).

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web8.Core.Models.MeshRouteResult
member.summary: The result of routing/relaying a MeshMessage - the computed path and per-hop relay outcomes.
